controls.description: Policies for information security must be defined, approved by management, published, and communicated to all relevant staff.
controls.logic: FAIL if no information_security_policy record exists, if policy_approved_by is NULL, or if last_review_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: All information security responsibilities must be clearly defined and allocated.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical system or data asset has no defined security_owner or if the security_owner field is NULL.

controls.description: Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility must be segregated to reduce opportunities for unauthorized or unintentional modification or misuse.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user has permissions to both approve_transactions AND execute_transactions in the same system, indicating a segregation of duties conflict.

controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets must be established and documented.
controls.logic: FAIL if no access_control_policy document exists, or if user access provisioning records show access granted without documented business_justification.

controls.description: The full lifecycle of identities must be managed — creation, modification, and deletion of user accounts must follow a defined process.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account has no creation_request_id, or if accounts are not disabled within 1 business day of employment termination.

controls.description: Authentication information management practices must be in place — passwords must meet complexity requirements, be rotated, and not be shared.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account has password_last_changed older than 90 days, or if password_complexity_enforced = FALSE, or if shared_account = TRUE.

controls.description: Access rights to information and systems must be reviewed at regular intervals and on any change of employment.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user account has last_access_review_date older than 90 days for privileged users or 6 months for standard users.

controls.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management, and exit from cloud services must be defined and controlled.
controls.logic: FAIL if any cloud_service record has no security_assessment_date, or if cloud_data_classification is NULL.

controls.description: The organization must define and apply procedures for the identification, collection, acquisition, and preservation of evidence related to information security events.
controls.logic: FAIL if incident records lack forensic_evidence_collected flag, or if evidence_chain_of_custody is not maintained.

controls.description: Background verification checks must be conducted on all candidates for employment prior to joining.
controls.logic: FAIL if any employee record has system_access_date earlier than background_screening_completed_date, or if background_screening_status = 'PENDING'.

controls.description: All employees and relevant contractors must complete information security awareness training on hire and annually thereafter.
controls.logic: FAIL if any active user has no security_training_completion_date, or if last_training_date is older than 12 months.

controls.description: Security perimeters must be defined and used to protect areas containing sensitive information and associated assets.
controls.logic: FAIL if any server_room or data_center record has physical_access_control_enabled = FALSE, or if unauthorized_access_events exist in the last 30 days.

controls.description: The allocation and use of privileged access rights must be restricted and controlled.
controls.logic: FAIL if any account with is_privileged = TRUE has no formal authorization_record, or if privileged_session_logging = FALSE.

controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures must be implemented based on access restriction requirements.
controls.logic: FAIL if MFA is not enabled for any user accessing sensitive systems or remote access, or if authentication_strength = 'WEAK'.

controls.description: Protection against malware must be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness training.
controls.logic: FAIL if any endpoint device has antimalware_installed = FALSE or antimalware_definitions_updated_date older than 7 days.

controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities of systems must be obtained, the organization's exposure evaluated, and appropriate measures taken.
controls.logic: FAIL if any system asset has vulnerability_scan_date older than 30 days, or if critical_vulnerabilities_open with age > 15 days exist.

controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures must be applied to systems, networks, and endpoint devices that process, store, or transmit sensitive information.
controls.logic: FAIL if any sensitive data transfer occurs without dlp_policy_applied = TRUE, or if dlp_solution_enabled = FALSE on any endpoint handling classified data.

controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults, and other relevant events must be produced, stored, protected, and analyzed.
controls.logic: FAIL if any critical system has logging_enabled = FALSE, or if log_retention_days is less than 90, or if logs are not protected from tampering.

controls.description: Networks, systems, and applications must be monitored for anomalous behavior and appropriate actions taken.
controls.logic: FAIL if monitoring_enabled = FALSE for any critical system, or if last_alert_review_date is older than 24 hours for active monitoring.

controls.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, must be defined and implemented.
controls.logic: FAIL if any sensitive data field has encryption_algorithm IN ('MD5','SHA1','DES','RC4') (deprecated), or if encryption_key_rotation_date is older than 12 months.
